user.title: SpotOracle
user.description: Pick a Nord Pool style price sensor whose 'prices' attribute is a list [{start, price}, ...] and provide your Fingrid Open Data API key.

data.floor_sensor: Current price sensor for floor calibration (optional)

data_description.floor_sensor: Optional. If set, the lower bound for predicted prices is derived from this sensor's long-term statistics (5th percentile of hourly minimums over the past 30 days). Use a sensor that records your current effective price at measurement state_class. Its unit_of_measurement must match the source price sensor.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure SpotOracle
reconfigure.description: Update SpotOracle settings. Existing prices history is preserved.

data.floor_sensor: Current price sensor for floor calibration (optional)

data_description.floor_sensor: Optional. If set, the lower bound for predicted prices is derived from this sensor's long-term statistics (5th percentile of hourly minimums over the past 30 days). Leave blank to disable floor clipping. Its unit_of_measurement must match the source price sensor.

error.invalid_api_key: Invalid API key — Fingrid rejected the credential.
error.unit_mismatch: Floor sensor unit must match the price sensor unit.
